description: Mentora practice garden background assets for the skills practice page. Use these as subtle decorative backgrounds behind dense practice UI, not as foreground content.
usageRules: Use as decorative background with alt="" and aria-hidden="true".
Keep opacity low behind text-heavy practice cards.
Use the mobile file below tablet widths and the default file for desktop layouts.
Do not place readable text directly on detailed image areas.
Reserve dimensions with an absolute background layer to avoid layout shift.

assets.title: Skill Garden Background
assets.description: Wide soft garden scene for the skills practice page background.

assets.title: Skill Garden Background Mobile
assets.description: Mobile-optimized soft garden scene for narrow skills practice layouts.
